heading: Use or release restriction: definition
label: 3786 Use or release restriction: definition

Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 3786 and 3787 were repealed by , title VII, § 701, , , 2955, effective .Pub. L. 96–513, title II, § 21394 Stat. 2885Dec. 12, 1980Sept. 15, 1981Section 3786, acts , ; , , , authorized Secretary of the Army, at any time during proceedings under this chapter and before removal of an officer from active list of Regular Army, to grant that officer’s request for voluntary retirement, if he is otherwise qualified therefor, or for honorable discharge with severance benefits. See .Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 219Pub. L. 86–616, § 2(a)74 Stat. 387section 1186 of this titleJuly 12, 1960Section 3787, added , , , provided that no officer serve on a board under this chapter unless he holds a regular or temporary grade above lieutenant colonel, and is senior in regular grade to, and outranks, any officer considered by board and that no person be a member of more than one board convened under this chapter for same officer. See .Pub. L. 86–616, § 2(a)74 Stat. 388section 1187 of this titleJuly 12, 1960

Amendments2021—, transferred subsec. (j) of to this section, struck out subsec. (j) designation and heading “Use or Release Restriction Defined” at beginning, and substituted “In this subchapter” for “In this section” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–283, § 1833(m)section 2321 of this title

children.text: to use such technical data; or
to release or disclose such technical data to persons outside the Government or permit the use of such technical data by persons outside the Government.
